message: Hey Shivam! Quick question - are you specifically interested in backend-heavy roles, or are you open to full-stack positions as well? Our AI team does both.
Hi Shivam, saw your DevLens project on GitHub. Really impressive RAG implementation with Pinecone! We're doing something similar at MediFlow. Would love to connect.
Quick follow up - do you have any equity expectations for a founding engineer role? We're flexible on comp structure.
Shivam - saw you're in the Bay Area. Our team is in San Jose, so no relocation needed. The role starts at 150k base. Worth a conversation?
